Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Name python* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_mmandLine -like ''''*binance_ingest*''''} | Select-Object Id, CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""Name=''python.exe''"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like ''*binance*'' } | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""ProcessId=22892"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 21484 -Force; Stop-Process -Id 5600 -Force; Write-Host ''Killed binance ingest workers 21484 and 5600''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""Name=''python.exe''"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like ''*binance_ingest_worker*'' } | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""Name=''python.exe''"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like ''*binance_ingest_worker*'' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force; Write-Host \(''Killed PID '' + $_.ProcessId\) }")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''c:\\Aione_projects\\v3\\data_v3\\BTCUSDT\\'' -Recurse -Filter ''*.jsonl'' | Where-Object { $_.Directory.Name -eq ''86400'' } | Format-Table FullName, Length, LastWriteTime; Get-ChildItem ''c:\\Aione_projects\\v3\\data_v3\\ETHUSDT\\'' -Recurse -Filter ''*.jsonl'' | Where-Object { $_.Directory.Name -eq ''86400'' } | Format-Table FullName, Length, LastWriteTime")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''c:\\Aione_projects\\v3\\data_v3\\'' -Recurse -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq ''86400'' } | ForEach-Object { Get-ChildItem $_.FullName | Format-Table Name, Length, LastWriteTime }")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""Name=''python.exe''"" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like ''*binance_ingest_worker*'' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force; Write-Host \(''Killed PID '' + $_.ProcessId\) }")
